arts.ttl: Man United, Tottenham 'hold talks' to sign 6ft 6in goalkeeper after Europa League heroics
arts.sum: Manchester United and Tottenham Hotspur reportedly both make enquiries over a summer deal for a highly-rated Bundesliga goalkeeper.

arts.ttl: Fixture amendments for Matchweek 37 Premier League matches
arts.sum: *Subject to Forest's participation in the FA Cup final The list below includes the possible movement of matches involving the teams who will play the FA Cup final on Saturday 17 May, which remains an exclusive matchday with no Premier League fixtures.

arts.ttl: I played in goal for Man United - I know why Andre Onana is struggling
arts.sum: Andre Onana is to return for Manchester United tonight when they host Lyon in the crucial second leg of their Europa League quarter-final

arts.ttl: Man United clash with Chelsea is moved to Friday night BEFORE the FA Cup final - as FA go back on their word
arts.sum: The match at Stamford Bridge was set to take place on Sunday 18 May at 3pm but it has been brought forward to the Friday, kicking off at 8pm.

arts.ttl: Manchester United vs Lyon LIVE: Europa League match stream, latest team news, lineups, TV, prediction
arts.sum: A huge quarter-final second leg at Old Trafford

arts.ttl: Man United transfer news: Red Devils get 'definitive answer' as they suffer Leon Goretzka transfer blow
arts.sum: Bayern Munich midfielder Leon Goretzka reportedly wants to remain at Bayern Munich past this season, damaging Manchester United's transfer plans.

arts.ttl: Man United transfer news: Struggling Red Devils attacker 'can leave Old Trafford in cut-price deal'
arts.sum: Manchester United would allegedly consider selling struggling striker Rasmus Hojlund for a cut-price fee during this summer's transfer window.

arts.ttl: Liam Delap 'prefers two clubs' over Man United as Ruben Amorim dealt £30m transfer setback
arts.sum: Ipswich Town's Liam Delap would supposedly rather join two Premier League clubs over Manchester United, handing Ruben Amorim a £30m setback.

arts.ttl: Collymore’s column: Arsenal’s Champions League hopes, Salah and van Dijk new deals, Andre Onana criticism, and more
arts.sum: In his exclusive column for CaughtOffside, former England striker Stan Collymore discusses some of football’s biggest talking points, including Arsenal and Aston Villa’s Champions League exploits, Liverpool tying down Mohamed Salah and Virgil van Dijk to new contracts, criticism of Andre Onana, and more. — Arsenal can win the Champions League after Real Madrid rout […] The post Collymore’s column: Arsenal’s Champions League hopes, Salah and van Dijk new deals, Andre Onana criticism, and more appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Man Utd push for €60m 'new Neuer' transfer as Onana replacement
arts.sum: Although Onana is expected to return to Amorim’s side for the Europa League quarter-final second leg against Lyon on Thursday, United have begun to scout long-term successors to the Cameroonian in the hopes of signing a new keeper this summer. Frankfurt extended Santos’ contract in October until 2030 and signalled to the player that they are planning on him for the long-term and believe that he is best suited to continue developing at the club.
